description_long: This handgun features a compact, utilitarian design with a combination of dark metal and wood elements. The frame and slide are constructed from matte black metal, with visible screws and a robust spring mechanism exposed above the trigger area. The grip is made of dark-stained wood, secured with black fasteners, and has a smooth, rectangular profile. The trigger guard is angular and minimalistic, providing just enough clearance for the trigger. The barrel is short and integrated into the main body, with no visible threading or compensator. The overall appearance is rugged and functional, with no visible manufacturer markings or decorative engravings.
description: A compact, rugged handgun with a matte black metal frame and a smooth, dark wood grip. The design is utilitarian, featuring exposed mechanical elements and minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: The handgun is seen from the muzzle end, showing the circular barrel opening and the rectangular profile of the slide and grip.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the exposed spring mechanism, angular trigger guard, and the smooth wooden grip panels secured with black screws.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the back of the slide and the full length of the wooden grip, with the magazine base visible at the bottom.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the same mechanical and grip features, with the spring and trigger guard clearly visible.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is rectangular with slightly rounded edges, constructed from dark-stained wood panels that are smooth and untextured. It is attached to the frame with black fasteners, and lacks finger grooves, checkering, or stippling. The surface appears polished but not glossy, providing a simple, classic look without ergonomic embellishments or logos.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is angular and minimalistic, with a straight lower edge and squared-off corners. It is relatively thin and provides just enough space for the trigger, lacking any undercuts, reinforcement, or integrated accessories. The design is utilitarian, with no visible texturing or decorative elements.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and integrated into the main body, with a plain, unthreaded muzzle and no external features such as compensators or fluting. The exterior finish matches the matte black metal of the slide, and there are no visible markings or embellishments.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is plain and unadorned, with no manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or decorative patterns apparent in any view.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and rectangular, flush with the bottom of the grip. It lacks any extension, beveling, or finger rest, and there are no visible logos or texturing. The design is simple and functional, matching the utilitarian aesthetic of the handgun.
